title: alternanthera rufa
intro: Alternanthera rufa, also known as red calico plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which help to protect against various health issues. The health benefits of Alternanthera rufa include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing oxidative stress, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusion, and extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
